dataset_name: YouTube Dataset on Mobile Streaming for Internet Traffic Modeling, Network Management, and Streaming Analysis

selection.criterion: duration >= 180 s; 40 complete sessions per bandwidth-change stratum; no outcome variables used

transformation_applied: The bandwidth setting is forward-applied until the next recorded change and converted from kbit/s to Mbps as a connection-capacity proxy. YouTube fmt is mapped to low/medium/high. Historical 120 s windows and strictly subsequent 30 s horizons are generated every 10 s.

reactive_source.license: Open data publication, see bundled LIZENZ.txt
reactive_source.transformations: Pseudo-label: high when upload >= 6.75 Mbps, medium when upload >= 3.375 Mbps, otherwise low; latency > 300 ms forces low and latency > 150 ms caps high to medium.

official_sources.predictive: YouTube Dataset on Mobile Streaming for Internet Traffic Modeling, Network Management, and Streaming Analysis
